Writing.title: Writing Document
Writing.description: An individual text piece written by the user for style analysis.

title.description: Title or context of the written text.

content.description: The textual content written by the user.

type.description: Whether it's an older text or a new draft.

StyleProfile.title: Style Profile Document
StyleProfile.description: The consolidated voice, fillers, and rhetorical patterns of the author.

voicePatterns.description: Key phrases or voice patterns identified.

fillers.description: Repetitive or filler words to avoid.

Evaluation.title: Text Evaluation Document
Evaluation.description: Analysis of a new text piece compared to the Style Profile.

fidelityScore.description: Scale of 1-100 of how close it is to the profile.

feedback.description: High-level feedback text from the tutor.

detectedFigures.description: Detected rhetorical devices in the new text.

writings.description: Collection of all written text fragments.

profiles.description: Stores style profile for the user.

evaluations.description: Stores user drafts and evaluations history.
